# MuleSoft Sockets Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.2) of Sockets Connector documentation.
> See [Sockets Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sockets-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Sockets Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Sockets Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sockets-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Sockets Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sockets-connector/latest/sockets-connector-examples.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Sockets Connector 1.2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sockets-connector/latest/sockets-connector-studio.md)
- [Troubleshooting Sockets Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sockets-connector/latest/sockets-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Sockets Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sockets-connector/latest/sockets-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Sockets Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sockets-connector/latest/sockets-documentation.md)
